concerns.text: FR-004 and SC-001 require Pearson/Spearman correlation analysis. Task T016 implements this but is marked incomplete [ ]. Without T016, the core correlation output `results/correlations.json` cannot be generated, leaving FR-004 unimplemented.

FR-005 and SC-004 require Bonferroni correction. Task T017 implements this but is marked incomplete [ ]. This leaves the statistical validity of the correlation analysis unverified and FR-005 unimplemented.
FR-010 requires documenting sample-size/power limitations if n < 50. Task T018a (logging function) is marked incomplete [ ]. No mechanism exists to satisfy FR-010.

FR-003 requires computing network metrics (degree, path length, clustering). Task T013 implements this but is marked incomplete [ ]. The required output `data/processed/metrics.csv` is missing, blocking all downstream analysis (US2/US3).

FR-004 requires scalarizing thermal conductivity (mean of k_x, k_y, k_z). Task T015 implements this extraction and CSV append but is marked incomplete [ ]. Correlation analysis cannot proceed without this target variable.

FR-006 and FR-009 require VIF-based collinearity filtering. Task T020a (VIF calculation) is marked incomplete [ ]. The regression model (T022) would likely train on collinear features, violating FR-009.
FR-007 and SC-002 require k-fold cross-validation. Task T023 (stratified k-fold CV) is marked incomplete [ ]. No performance metrics (R², RMSE) can be generated, leaving FR-007 unimplemented.

Plan/Spec assume robust environment config (API keys, seeds). Task T004b (`code/config.py`) is marked incomplete [ ]. This risks reproducibility failures and hard-coded secrets, violating Constitution Principle I.

SC-005 mandates pipeline completion within 6 hours. Task T029 (runtime monitor wrapper) is marked incomplete [ ]. No automated enforcement or verification mechanism exists for this critical success criterion.

Task T014a is marked incomplete [ ] and described as 'diagnostic only' logging. The Plan (Phase 1) and Spec (FR-002 context) imply physical descriptors are needed for confounder control. The 'diagnostic only' constraint creates ambiguity on whether the plan's intent to 'control for confounding size/physics effects' is actually implemented in the regression model (T022).
